case_title: CORDOVA RAYMUNDO VS ESCOBAR TONY DBA ESCOBAR REALTY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY CORDOVA RAYMUNDO AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR TONY DBA ESCOBAR REALTY LOPEZ VIRGINIA VELASCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR TONY DBA ESCOBAR REALTY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDOVA RAYMUNDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR TONY DBA ESCOBAR REALTY LOPEZ VIRGINIA VELASCO $700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
JUDGEMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST SATISFACTION JUDGMENT SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
